axiom: Instrument before you need it. The cheapest debugging session is a trace you already have.
gap_filled: Local langsmith/phoenix/mlflow skills each cover ONE backend; none helps the coder DECIDE which backend fits stack/scale/budget, nor wire a one-line autolog before first deploy.

operations.name: Backend decision table
operations.trigger: LM project with no observability backend chosen yet (Stage 1)
operations.action: Match dominant constraint (stack / scale / hosting) to a backend row; first match wins
operations.output: Exactly one backend + its handoff skill

decision_rows.if: stack is LangChain/LangGraph/LlamaIndex, managed SaaS OK
decision_rows.why: first-class native integration, same team builds both

decision_rows.if: OSS-only / local-first / want OpenTelemetry / no lock-in
decision_rows.caveat: you run the infra; Arize Cloud if outgrown

decision_rows.why: LLM traces alongside existing runs/registry, autolog per framework
decision_rows.caveat: LLM-trace UI younger than purpose-built tools
no local skill; install per docs; OTel-compatible

decision_rows.if: mixed stack / framework churn / want portability
decision_rows.why: standard span schema, swap backends without re-instrumenting
decision_rows.caveat: still need a concrete viewer; Phoenix is OTel-native

operations.name: One-line autolog per backend

action.langsmith: export LANGSMITH_TRACING=true; LANGSMITH_API_KEY=...; LANGSMITH_PROJECT=my-app (raw SDK: wrap_openai / @traceable)
action.phoenix: import phoenix as px; px.launch_app(); from phoenix.otel import register; register(auto_instrument=True)

operations.output: Traces flow on next LM call, no hand-written per-call instrumentation

operations.name: Verify a trace actually landed
operations.action: Run one real call; open UI; confirm inputs+outputs+latency+token count appear. If empty: check project name, env var exported in this process, sampling != 0
operations.output: One verified trace = backend real not just configured

operations.name: Add eval hooks on raw traces
operations.action: Attach evaluator (LLM-as-judge / dataset evaluators / logged metrics) + dataset built from real traces + cost/latency alerts; defer deep API to backend skill
operations.output: Traces become regression-catching system, not just a log

operations.name: What to trace (minimum payload)
operations.action: Per LM call capture: rendered prompt, response, model id, latency, token in/out, upstream context (RAG: query+retrieved_nodes+scores+index_id; agents: tool+args+observation)
operations.output: Span that answers 'why did it do that' without a re-run

operations.name: Handoff to backend skill
operations.action: Stop; invoke chosen backend's own skill (langsmith/phoenix/mlflow). Overlay does not duplicate their APIs
operations.output: Clean separation: decision/wiring here, depth there

dilemma_cases.name: Vendor lock-in: LangSmith vs OSS Phoenix
dilemma_cases.tension: speed-to-trace + native integration (LangSmith) vs no lock-in + data control (Phoenix)
dilemma_cases.resolution: LangChain/LangGraph-first + SaaS-OK -> LangSmith now; data-must-stay-in-house or OSS stack -> Phoenix + accept self-host. Wrong move = ship with neither (AP-15). OTel keeps migration possible.

dilemma_cases.name: Trace volume at scale (Replit problem)
dilemma_cases.tension: full observability vs cost & signal-to-noise at production volume; per-trace SaaS pricing scales with users
dilemma_cases.resolution: Not binary trace-all/none: (1) sample full-fidelity on errors + small % success; (2) move to self-host (Phoenix/Langfuse) past break-even; (3) curate eval datasets from sampled traces. Decide policy before the bill/noise forces a panic migration.

anti_patterns: AP-15: no observability in production (ship with no trace UI) — headline trap
Over-instrumenting: two backends, span-per-function, custom layer before trying autolog
Configured-but-empty: declare victory without verifying a trace landed (OP-3)
Tracing prompt but not response/context (truncation/refusal/bad-retrieval live there)
Full-fidelity tracing on at scale with no cost/sampling plan (Case B)
boundaries: Backend already chosen -> use langsmith/phoenix/mlflow directly
Need one prompt right now, no setup -> prompt-history-inspect
Pure ML experiment tracking, no LLM calls -> plain MLflow, no decision needed
Pre-call infra failure (auth/network/import) -> fix infra, nothing to trace yet

OpenTelemetry-GenAI.turn_on: instrument with OTel GenAI conventions, export to chosen backend
